name: ocpsvg
documentation:
# OCPSVG

- works at the [`OCP`](https://github.com/CadQuery/OCP) level
- uses [`svgelements`](https://github.com/meerk40t/svgelements) to:
  - convert SVG path strings to and from `TopoDS_Edge`, `TopoDS_Wire`, and `TopoDS_Face` objects
  - import `TopoDS_Wire` and `TopoDS_Face` objects from an SVG document
- can be used to add SVG functionality (import and export) to higher level API

functions.name: ocpsvg.ocp.face_outer_wire
documentation: Find the outer wire of a face.

functions.name: ocpsvg.ocp.face_inner_wires
documentation: Find the inner wires of a face.

functions.name: ocpsvg.ocp.face_from_wires
documentation: Make a face from an outer wire and optional inner wire(s).

functions.name: ocpsvg.ocp.faces_from_wire_soup
documentation: Make faces from unorganized, possibly nested (but non-intersecting) wires.

functions.name: ocpsvg.ocp.is_wire_closed
documentation: Check whether a wire is closed.

functions.name: ocpsvg.ocp.wire_from_continuous_edges
documentation:
Make a single wire from known-continuous edges;
with no reordering nor any checking.

functions.name: ocpsvg.ocp.closed_wire
documentation:
Ensure a wire is closed.
- if already closed return it untouched.
- otherwise return a new wire with a closing segment appended.

functions.name: ocpsvg.svg.import_svg_document
documentation:
Import shapes from an SVG document as faces and/or wires.

Each visible shape and path is converted to zero or more Face if it is filled,
and to zero or more Wire if it is not filled.

This importer does not cover the whole SVG specification,
its most notable known limitations are:

- degenerate and self-crossing paths may result in invalid faces and wires
- clipping, both by clipping paths and viewport, is ignored
- graphic properties such as line strokes and pattern fills are ignored

Documents relying on these features need to be pre-processed externally.

```
param svg_file

input SVG document

param flip_y

whether to mirror the Y-coordinates
to compensate for SVG's top left origin, defaults to True

param ignore_visibility

whether to ignore visibility
attribute and process hidden elements.

param metadata

funtion to generate metadata from the source SVG element

raises IOError



raises SyntaxError



raises ValueError

```
